name: 10-K Risk Factors (prose only)
description: 10-K risk factors prose under Reg S-K Item 105 (with annual updates). Per spec §6.P caveat: v4 lints prose only (REG-040). Selects the §6.P shared risk-factors ruleset (REG-016..REG-024).

name: Advance Directive / Living Will
description: Advance directive / living will under state advance-directive statutes (e.g., CA Prob. § 4670; NY Pub. Health § 2980). Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-017..EST-023).

name: AI Usage Addendum
description: Linter for an AI / Generative-AI Addendum to a commercial agreement. Selects the §34 addenda ruleset (AI portion, ADDENDA-010..016): definitions (Generative AI / Foundation Model / Output / Training Data), prohibited training-on-customer-data without opt-in, transparency (features + default state + hosting), IP ownership of outputs, AI hallucination disclaimer + human-review obligation, AI subprocessor disclosure, deletion of fine-tuning data on termination. Citations are NIST AI RMF / EU AI Act / FTC enforcement — explicitly labeled 'consensus practice, not statute' where no controlling regulator applies.

sources.source: NIST AI RMF 1.0 (consensus practice, not statute)
FTC enforcement actions on AI claims (consensus practice, not statute)

name: AI Acceptable Use Policy
description: AI / generative-AI acceptable use policy under NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + USPTO guidance. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-037..POL-041).
compliance_matrix_columns: Prohibited inputs (PHI / PII / trade secrets / privileged)

name: Anti-Money-Laundering Policy
description: AML / OFAC / BSA policy under FinCEN five-pillar rule + Corporate Transparency Act + state. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-012..POL-017).

name: Anti-Bribery / Anti-Corruption Policy (FCPA / UKBA)
description: Anti-bribery policy under FCPA + UK Bribery Act + multi-jurisdiction baselines. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-006..POL-011).

name: Appellate Brief (filing-format)
description: An appellate brief. Selects the filing-format-lint pack (FILE-001..008) when a court profile is chosen via --court; dormant otherwise. Contract-lint rules are suppressed as on generic-fallback.

name: Asset Purchase Agreement (APA)
description: Asset purchase agreement under UCC § 9, IRC § 1060, and state bulk-sales law. Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-020..MNA-028).

name: Business Associate Agreement (HIPAA)
description: Covered-entity to business-associate BAA under HIPAA. Selects the §28 BAA ruleset (45 rules) covering 45 CFR § 164.504(e) required clauses, § 164.314(a) Security Rule flow-down, § 164.410 breach notification, plus HHS-guidance posture rules.

sources.source: 45 C.F.R. Part 164 — HIPAA Privacy and Security Rules

name: BAA — Business Associate to Subcontractor (HIPAA)
description: Business-associate to subcontractor BAA under HIPAA. Selects the §28 BAA ruleset (45 rules) covering 45 CFR § 164.504(e) required clauses, § 164.314(a) Security Rule flow-down, § 164.410 breach notification, plus HHS-guidance posture rules — with an emphasis on flow-down (the subcontractor must comply with the same terms the upstream BAA imposes on the business associate, per 45 CFR § 164.502(e)(1)(ii) and § 164.504(e)(5)). Companion: the upstream BAA between the covered entity and the business associate.

sources.source: 45 C.F.R. Part 164 — HIPAA Privacy and Security Rules
HHS HIPAA Omnibus Rule (78 Fed. Reg. 5566, Jan. 25, 2013) — subcontractor-as-business-associate provisions

name: Corporate Bylaws
description: Bylaws of a Delaware (or MBCA-modeled) corporation. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-001..GOV-012) plus the cross-applicable governance rules.

name: CC&Rs (Declaration of Covenants, Conditions, and Restrictions)
description: Declaration of CC&Rs creating an owners association under state HOA statutes (e.g., Davis-Stirling Act). Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-032..RE-039).

name: Cease-and-Desist Letter
description: Cease-and-desist letter (IP, unfair competition, defamation). Lanham Act § 43(a) baseline; anti-SLAPP / extortion risk screen. Selects the §6.G settlement ruleset (SET-016..SET-020).

name: Change Order
description: Construction change order under AIA G701 baseline with contract-sum + time-adjustment summary. Selects the §6.M ruleset (CON-026..CON-030).

name: Certificate / Articles of Incorporation
description: Charter of a Delaware (or MBCA-modeled) corporation. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-023..GOV-032).

title_keywords: amended and restated certificate of incorporation

name: Code of Conduct / Ethics
description: Code of business conduct / ethics under NYSE 303A / Nasdaq 5610 / SOX § 406. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-001..POL-005).

name: Certificate of Insurance (COI) Check
description: Linter for an ACORD 25 Certificate of Liability Insurance. Extracts carrier, AM Best rating, coverage amounts, and endorsements and lints against the §12 default requirements profile or a customer-supplied profile. The AM Best rating threshold is consulted from the DKB node `am-best-ratings.json` (curated for the build; cited as 'AM Best public ratings as of [DKB build date]'). Note: the ACORD-25 binary spatial-layout extractor lands in a follow-up commit alongside the COI test fixture corpus; this playbook is text-extraction-driven for now.

sources.license: Public ratings re-use (ratings cited; identifier text not re-distributed)
Form identifier only (not the form itself)

name: Conflict of Interest Policy
description: Conflict of interest policy under IRS Form 990 + IRC § 4958 + state nonprofit law. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-033..POL-036).

name: Board Committee Charter (audit / comp / nominating)
description: Charter for a board committee subject to NYSE / Nasdaq listing standards and SOX § 301. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-051..GOV-060).

title_keywords: nominating and corporate governance committee charter

name: Confidential Settlement Agreement
description: Confidential settlement agreement with NLRB *McLaren Macomb*, SEC Rule 21F-17 carve-out, and IRC § 162(q) compliance. Selects the §6.G settlement ruleset (SET-003..SET-010).

name: Construction Contract (AIA-style)
description: AIA A101 / A201-style owner-contractor agreement with anti-indemnity screen. Selects the §6.M ruleset (CON-001..CON-007).

name: Construction Lien Waiver
description: Mechanic's-lien waiver (conditional / unconditional, progress / final) under state-prescribed forms (CA Civ. § 8132–8138 and analogous). Selects the §6.M ruleset (CON-014..CON-019).

name: Contributor License Agreement (CLA)
description: OSS contributor license agreement (ASF ICLA / corporate CCLA pattern) with defensive-termination patent grant. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-025..IPL-029).

name: Convertible Promissory Note
description: Convertible promissory note (UCC Article 3 negotiable instrument convertible into preferred stock at next qualified financing). Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-010..EQT-018).

name: Cookie / Tracking Notice
description: Cookie / tracking notice with ePrivacy + GDPR Art. 7 consent and CCPA / CPRA opt-out (GPC). Selects the §6.I ruleset (PRV-001..PRV-006).

name: Copyright License Agreement
description: Copyright license with 17 U.S.C. § 204 writing requirement and § 106 rights enumeration. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-019..IPL-024).

name: Deed of Trust / Mortgage
description: Deed of trust or mortgage with power-of-sale + due-on-sale + state recording-act compliance. Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-039..BNK-044).

name: Demand Letter
description: Pre-suit demand letter (debt, wage, contract, PAGA) with FDCPA compliance and reservation of rights. Selects the §6.G settlement ruleset (SET-011..SET-015).

name: Disclosure Schedules
description: Schedules qualifying representations and warranties in a private-target M&A agreement. Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-039..MNA-045).
compliance_matrix_columns: ABA Private Target Deal Points Study

name: Document Retention Policy
description: Records retention policy under SEC + IRS + DOL + Sedona Principles + state. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-028..POL-032).

name: DPA — CCPA Service Provider (CPRA-aligned)
description: Data Processing Agreement asserting CCPA 'Service Provider' status under Cal. Civ. Code § 1798.140(ag) and 11 CCR § 7051. Selects the §30 DPA-US-state ruleset (25 rules).

name: DPA — Controller to Processor (EU/UK)
description: Data Processing Agreement under GDPR and UK GDPR. Selects the §29 DPA-GDPR ruleset (55 rules) covering Article 28(3) enumerated clauses, Articles 28(2)/(4)/(9) subprocessor governance, Articles 27, 30, 32, 33(2), 35, 37, and Chapter V international transfers. Companion: MSA + SCC-Module-2 if processor is non-EU/UK.

name: DPA — Multi-State US (CCPA, VCDPA, CPA, CTDPA, UCPA, TDPSA, OCPA, DPDPA)
description: Multi-state DPA covering CCPA + VCDPA + CPA + CTDPA + UCPA + TDPSA + OCPA + DPDPA. Selects the §30 DPA-US-state ruleset (25 rules) and applies the strictest-applicable floor.

name: DPA — Processor to Sub-Processor (EU/UK GDPR)
description: Data Processing Agreement from a processor to its sub-processor under GDPR and UK GDPR. Selects the §29 DPA-GDPR ruleset (55 rules) covering Article 28(3) enumerated clauses, Articles 28(2)/(4)/(9) subprocessor governance, Articles 27, 30, 32, 33(2), 35, 37, and Chapter V international transfers — with an emphasis on Article 28(4) flow-down (the sub-processor must be bound by the same data-protection obligations as the upstream processor-controller DPA). Companion: the upstream controller-processor DPA and SCC Module 3 when the sub-processor is non-EU/UK.

negative_features: between the controller and the processor

sources.source: UK GDPR (Data Protection Act 2018, as amended) — Art. 28 sub-processor governance

name: Data Protection Impact Assessment (GDPR Art. 35)
description: GDPR Art. 35 DPIA covering necessity, proportionality, risk assessment, and mitigations. Selects the §6.I ruleset (PRV-021..PRV-026).

name: Durable Power of Attorney (Financial)
description: Durable POA under UPOAA + state POA statutes with 'hot powers' specific grant. Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-031..EST-037).

name: Earnout Agreement
description: Post-closing contingent-consideration earnout (Delaware *Lazard / Aveta* line). Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-063..MNA-071).

name: Easement Agreement
description: Real-property easement agreement (appurtenant / in gross; affirmative / negative). Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-025..RE-031).

name: Employee Handbook
description: Employee handbook (scoped subset — at-will, EEO, wage/hour, leave, social media, acknowledgment). Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-045..EMP-050).

name: Employment Restrictive Covenant Agreement
description: Employment-side non-compete / non-solicit covenant. Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-024..EMP-031). Subject to FTC NCR § 910 and state non-compete law.
compliance_matrix_columns: State non-compete law (CA / MA / WA / NY / CO)

name: M&A Escrow Agreement
description: Tri-party escrow agreement supporting an SPA / APA / merger. Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-046..MNA-054).

name: Estoppel Certificate
description: Tenant estoppel certificate delivered for refinancing or sale. Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-040..RE-045).

name: End-User License Agreement (EULA)
description: Linter for an End-User License Agreement / Software License Agreement. Selects the §34 addenda ruleset (EULA portion, ADDENDA-017..018): explicit license grant scope + prohibited-uses enumeration, EU consumer-law minimums (Digital Content Directive 2019/770 + Consumer Rights Directive 2011/83).

name: Executive Employment Agreement
description: Senior-executive employment agreement (CEO, CFO, named executive officer). Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-001..EMP-008).

name: Family-Law MSA (Separation / Marital Settlement)
description: Family-law marital settlement / separation agreement under state divorce codes. Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-053..EST-059).

name: Form ADV Part 2A Brochure
description: Investment-adviser brochure (Form ADV Part 2A) under Rule 204-3. Per spec §6.P caveat: v4 lints prose only (REG-040). Selects the §6.P ruleset (REG-008..REG-015).

name: Form D Narrative
description: Form D narrative supporting a Reg D Rule 504 / 506(b) / 506(c) exempt offering. Per spec §6.P caveat: v4 lints prose only (REG-040). Selects the §6.P ruleset (REG-001..REG-007).

name: Ground Lease
description: Long-term ground lease (49 / 50 / 99 years) with tenant construction rights and leasehold-mortgage protections. Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-018..RE-024).

name: Guaranty
description: Continuing guaranty of payment with suretyship-defenses waiver and reinstatement clause. Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-021..BNK-026).

name: Healthcare Proxy / POA for Healthcare
description: Healthcare proxy / durable POA for healthcare under state healthcare-POA statutes. Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-024..EST-030).

name: HIPAA Notice of Privacy Practices
description: HIPAA Notice of Privacy Practices under 45 C.F.R. § 164.520. Selects the §6.I ruleset (PRV-007..PRV-014).

distinguishing_phrases: treatment, payment, and health care operations

name: Hold-Harmless Agreement
description: Standalone hold-harmless agreement (typically participant / event release) with Tunkl-factor and assumption-of-risk screen. Selects the §6.K ruleset (INS-020..INS-025).

name: Data-Incident Notification Template
description: Data-incident / breach notification template covering GDPR Art. 33 / 34 + HIPAA + US state breach laws. Selects the §6.I ruleset (PRV-034..PRV-040).

name: Indemnification Agreement (standalone)
description: Standalone indemnification agreement with anti-indemnity statute screen (NY § 5-322.1, CA § 2782, TX § 151). Selects the §6.K ruleset (INS-013..INS-019).

name: Informed Consent (Research / Clinical)
description: Informed consent under 45 C.F.R. § 46.116 (Common Rule) + 21 C.F.R. § 50 (FDA). Prose elements only. Selects the §6.J ruleset (HC-001..HC-009).

name: Insider Trading Policy
description: Insider trading policy under Rule 10b-5 + Rule 10b5-1 (Dec. 2022 amendments). Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-018..POL-022).

name: Insurance Endorsement Review
description: Insurance endorsement review (ISO / AAIS forms + state filings). Selects the §6.K ruleset (INS-007..INS-012).

name: Insurance Policy Summary / Declarations
description: Insurance policy declarations / summary review under state insurance codes. Selects the §6.K ruleset (INS-001..INS-006).

name: Intercreditor Agreement
description: Intercreditor / lien-priority agreement (1L / 2L) — LSTA model baseline. Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-027..BNK-032).

name: Investor Rights Agreement (NVCA)
description: NVCA-style investor rights agreement carrying registration / information / pro rata / ROFO / stand-off provisions. Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-049..EQT-056).

name: IP Assignment Agreement
description: Assignment of patents / trademarks / copyrights / trade secrets. 35 U.S.C. § 261 / 17 U.S.C. § 204 baseline. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-001..IPL-006).

name: Last Will and Testament
description: Last will and testament (text-only lint) under UPC §§ 2-501–509 + state will codes. Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060 disclaimer). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-001..EST-008).

name: Assignment of Lease
description: Assignment of a commercial or residential lease with landlord consent and assignee assumption. Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-054..RE-060).

name: Litigation Hold Notice
description: Litigation hold / preservation notice (FRCP 37(e), *Zubulake*). Selects the §6.G settlement ruleset (SET-025..SET-030).

name: Loan Agreement
description: Commercial loan agreement (term / revolver) with affirmative + negative + financial covenants. LSTA / ABA model baseline. Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-007..BNK-013).

name: Lobbying / Political Contribution Policy
description: Lobbying + political-contribution policy under federal LDA + FECA + state lobbying laws + federal gift rules. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-046..POL-050).

name: Letter of Intent / Term Sheet
description: Pre-definitive-agreement LOI or term sheet outlining commercial terms with binding / non-binding demarcation. Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-001..MNA-009).

name: M&A Restrictive Covenant Agreement
description: Sale-of-business non-compete / non-solicit covenants under the FTC NCR sale-of-business exception (16 C.F.R. § 910.2(a)(2)). Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-072..MNA-080).

name: Merger Agreement
description: Plan and agreement of merger under DGCL §§ 251–259. Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-029..MNA-038).

name: MSA — Customer-Side Deep Analysis
description: Deep analysis of a Master Services Agreement (or Master Subscription Agreement) from the customer's perspective. Selects the §33 MSA-deep ruleset (30 rules). Replaces v2's saas-customer playbook. Oriented toward catching customer-unfriendly drafting: no security commitments, missing SLA, broad assignment rights, no data return on termination, indemnity carved out of the cap, sole-and-exclusive SLA credit remedy, missing wind-down period.

sources.source: Commercial drafting baseline (UCC Article 2 + state overlays)

name: MSA — Vendor-Side Deep Analysis
description: Deep analysis of a Master Services Agreement (or Master Subscription Agreement) from the vendor's perspective. Selects the §33 MSA-deep ruleset (30 rules). Replaces v2's saas-vendor playbook and overlaps msa-general for vendor-side review. Oriented toward catching vendor-friendly drafting that may not survive customer review: low liability caps, broad disclaimers, narrow indemnities, broad limitation of liability, unbounded feedback license, AI-usage non-disclosure.

sources.source: Commercial drafting baseline (UCC Article 2 + state overlays)

name: Mutual NDA — Deep Analysis
description: Mutual / two-way non-disclosure agreement under US trade-secret law. Selects the §32 NDA-deep ruleset (25 rules) covering DTSA whistleblower-immunity notice (18 U.S.C. § 1833(b)), Confidential-Information definition completeness, four standard exclusions (publicly available, prior knowledge, lawful third-party, independent development), permitted-use scope, residuals, return-or-destruction with attestation, injunctive relief with waiver-of-bond, governing-law viability, no-precedent / MFN, non-solicit carve-outs, no-license, authority representation, successors-and-assigns, plus the mutual-NDA symmetry check.

sources.source: 18 U.S.C. § 1833(b) — Defend Trade Secrets Act whistleblower immunity / notice requirement
Common Paper Mutual NDA standard (consensus NDA drafting practice)

name: Mutual / General Release
description: Mutual or general release of claims with optional California Civil Code § 1542 waiver. Selects the §6.G settlement ruleset (SET-001..SET-005, SET-008).

name: Single-Tenant Net Lease (NNN)
description: Single-tenant triple-net (NNN) commercial lease. Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-001..RE-008).

name: Nonprofit Bylaws (501(c)(3))
description: Bylaws of a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt nonprofit corporation. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-071..GOV-080).

distinguishing_phrases: no part of the net earnings

name: Notice of Privacy Practices Acknowledgment
description: HIPAA NPP acknowledgment under 45 C.F.R. § 164.520(c)(2)(ii). Selects the §6.J ruleset (HC-019..HC-025).

name: Offer Letter
description: Employment offer letter. Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-009..EMP-014).

name: LLC Operating Agreement
description: Operating agreement of a Delaware (or similar) LLC. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-013..GOV-022).

description: Open-source software compliance audit / SBOM document. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-030..IPL-035).

description: General partnership / limited-partnership agreement under RUPA and DRULPA. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-061..GOV-070).

name: Patent License Agreement
description: Patent license with *Brulotte / Kimble* post-expiration-royalty screen and 35 U.S.C. § 287 marking. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-007..IPL-012).

name: Payment / Performance Bond
description: Construction payment or performance bond under Miller Act + state Little Miller Acts. AIA A312 baseline. Selects the §6.M ruleset (CON-020..CON-025).

name: Petition (filing-format)
description: A petition (e.g., writ, review, or original). Selects the filing-format-lint pack when a court profile is chosen via --court; dormant otherwise. Contract-lint rules are suppressed as on generic-fallback.

title_keywords: petition for a writ of certiorari

name: Patient Authorization for Release of PHI
description: HIPAA authorization for use / disclosure of PHI under 45 C.F.R. § 164.508. Selects the §6.J ruleset (HC-010..HC-018).

name: Proprietary Information and Inventions Agreement (PIIA)
description: Employee PIIA / IP-assignment agreement (Cal. Lab. § 2870 carve-out where applicable; DTSA notice). Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-032..EMP-038).

name: Performance Improvement Plan (PIP)
description: Employee performance-improvement plan with measurable goals, support commitments, and consequences. Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-039..EMP-044).

name: Postnuptial Agreement
description: Postnuptial agreement under state postnup law (varies sharply). Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-046..EST-052).

name: Private Placement Memorandum (PPM) Narrative
description: Private placement memorandum narrative under Reg D + state blue-sky. Per spec §6.P caveat: v4 lints prose only (REG-040). Selects the §6.P ruleset (REG-025..REG-032).

name: Prenuptial Agreement
description: Prenuptial agreement under UPAA / UPMAA + state family law. Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-038..EST-045).

name: Privacy Notice (GDPR)
description: A GDPR Article 13/14 privacy notice. Selects the privacy-notice pack when a regime is asserted via --regime; dormant otherwise. Contract-lint rules are suppressed as on generic-fallback.

name: Privacy Notice (US / CCPA)
description: A consumer-facing US privacy notice / policy. Selects the privacy-notice pack (PNOT presence rules) when a regime is asserted via --regime; dormant otherwise. Contract-lint rules are suppressed as on generic-fallback.

name: Privacy Policy Linter
description: Linter for a published privacy policy. Not a contract — checks that the regulator-required disclosures are present (CCPA § 1798.130 categories, GDPR Articles 13/14 lawful basis + rights, COPPA § 312.4 child-data disclosures). Selects the §34 addenda ruleset (privacy portion, ADDENDA-020). When paired with a DPA, a follow-up consistency check verifies the privacy-policy claims match the DPA terms.

name: Promissory Note
description: Promissory note under UCC Article 3 with state-usury savings clause. Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-001..BNK-006).

name: Real-Estate Purchase and Sale Agreement (PSA)
description: Real-property PSA under state real-property law and the Statute of Frauds. Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-009..RE-017).

name: Reg A+ Offering Circular
description: Reg A+ Tier 1 / Tier 2 offering circular (Form 1-A) prose. Per spec §6.P caveat: v4 lints prose only (REG-040). Selects the §6.P ruleset (REG-033..REG-039).
compliance_matrix_columns: Use of proceeds + plan of distribution

name: Revocable Living Trust
description: Revocable living trust under UTC + state trust codes with pour-over coordination. Per spec §6.N caveat: execution formalities cannot be verified from text alone (EST-060). Selects the §6.N ruleset (EST-009..EST-016).

name: ROFR / Co-Sale Agreement (NVCA)
description: NVCA-style right of first refusal and co-sale agreement on transfers of common / founder stock. Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-064..EQT-070).

title_keywords: right of first refusal and co-sale agreement

name: Records of Processing Activities (GDPR Art. 30)
description: GDPR Art. 30 records of processing activities for controllers / processors. Selects the §6.I ruleset (PRV-015..PRV-020).

name: Restricted Stock Purchase Agreement
description: Founder / early-employee restricted stock purchase agreement subject to vesting and a § 83(b) election. Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-036..EQT-042).

name: Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) Grant
description: RSU grant under an equity-incentive plan (IRC § 409A short-term-deferral or deferred-compensation). Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-029..EQT-035).

name: S-1 Risk Factors (prose only)
description: S-1 risk factors prose under Reg S-K Item 105 + plain-English rule. Per spec §6.P caveat: v4 lints prose only (REG-040). Selects the §6.P shared risk-factors ruleset (REG-016..REG-023).

distinguishing_phrases: we may not be able to

name: SaaS Terms of Service (Consumer-Facing)
description: Linter for a consumer-facing SaaS Terms of Service / Terms of Use. Selects the §34 addenda ruleset (ToS portion, ADDENDA-019): FTC Click-to-Cancel rule + ROSCA alignment. v2's dark-patterns ruleset is also active on this surface (browsewrap, buried notice, class-action waiver, asymmetric jury-trial waiver) at elevated severity.

sources.source: FTC Negative Option / Click-to-Cancel Rule (16 C.F.R. Part 425)

compliance_matrix_columns: Dark-patterns surface (v2 reused at elevated severity)

name: Simple Agreement for Future Equity (Y Combinator SAFE)
description: Y Combinator SAFE (post-money or pre-money variant). Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-001..EQT-009).

name: EU Standard Contractual Clauses — Module 2 (Controller to Processor)
description: Verifies the official EU SCC Module 2 text (Commission Implementing Decision 2021/914) is incorporated and checks Annexes I, II, III. Re-runs the §29 DPA-GDPR ruleset because SCC Module 2 must satisfy Article 28(3) by reference.

name: EU Standard Contractual Clauses — Module 3 (Processor to Processor)
description: Verifies the official EU SCC Module 3 text (Commission Implementing Decision 2021/914) is incorporated and checks Annexes I, II, III. Selects the §29 DPA-GDPR ruleset and §31 transfer-mechanism ruleset.

name: § 83(b) Election Form
description: Section 83(b) election form per Treas. Reg. § 1.83-2. Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-043..EQT-048).

name: Security Agreement
description: Security agreement under UCC Article 9 (attachment + perfection + remedies). Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-014..BNK-020).

name: Separation / Severance Agreement
description: Separation / severance agreement with ADEA waiver (OWBPA § 626(f)) and NLRB *McLaren Macomb* compliance. Selects the §6.F employment ruleset (EMP-015..EMP-023).

name: SNDA (Subordination, Non-Disturbance, Attornment)
description: Tri-party SNDA between landlord, tenant, and mortgagee. Selects the §6.E real-estate ruleset (RE-046..RE-053).

name: Social Media / External Communications Policy
description: Social media / external communications policy under NLRA § 7 + SEC Reg FD + FTC endorsement guides. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-042..POL-045).

name: Stock Option Grant Notice + Agreement
description: Stock option grant under an equity-incentive plan (ISO under IRC § 422 or NSO under § 409A). Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-019..EQT-028).

name: Stock Purchase Agreement (SPA)
description: Private-target stock purchase agreement. Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-010..MNA-019). ABA Private Target Deal Points anchors.
compliance_matrix_columns: ABA Private Target Deal Points Study

name: Stockholders' Agreement
description: Venture-style stockholders' / investors' rights agreement. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-033..GOV-042). NVCA-anchored.

name: Subcontractor Agreement
description: Subcontractor agreement with prime flow-down + pay-when/if-paid screen. ConsensusDocs 750 / AIA A401 baseline. Selects the §6.M ruleset (CON-008..CON-013).

name: Subordination Agreement
description: Subordination agreement under UCC § 9-339 + Bankruptcy Code § 510(a). Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-033..BNK-038).

name: Tolling Agreement
description: Tolling agreement pausing the statute of limitations during pre-suit negotiations. Selects the §6.G settlement ruleset (SET-021..SET-024).

name: Trademark License Agreement
description: Trademark license with naked-license avoidance (quality control) and proper-use guidelines. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-013..IPL-018).

name: Transition Services Agreement (TSA)
description: Post-closing transition services agreement (seller / corporate parent provides services to buyer / divested business). Selects the §6.D M&A ruleset (MNA-055..MNA-062).

name: Trial Motion (filing-format)
description: A trial-court motion. Selects the filing-format-lint pack when a court profile is chosen via --court; dormant otherwise. Contract-lint rules are suppressed as on generic-fallback.

name: UCC-1 Financing Statement (prose)
description: UCC-1 financing statement prose components under UCC § 9-502 / § 9-503 / § 9-504. Selects the §6.L ruleset (BNK-045..BNK-050).

name: UK International Data Transfer Addendum / IDTA
description: UK Addendum to EU SCCs or standalone UK IDTA. Selects the §31 transfer-mechanism ruleset (20 rules) covering Tables/Parts completion, mandatory-clauses integrity, TIA/TRA, adequacy-decision posture, and onward transfers.

sources.source: ICO International Data Transfer Agreement and Addendum

name: Unilateral NDA — Deep Analysis
description: One-way / unilateral non-disclosure agreement under US trade-secret law. Selects the §32 NDA-deep ruleset (25 rules) covering DTSA whistleblower-immunity notice (18 U.S.C. § 1833(b)), Confidential-Information definition completeness, four standard exclusions, permitted-use scope, residuals, return-or-destruction with attestation, injunctive relief with waiver-of-bond, governing-law viability, no-precedent / MFN, non-solicit carve-outs, no-license, authority representation, successors-and-assigns, plus the unilateral-NDA role-framing check (disclosing-party / receiving-party labels must be present).

sources.source: 18 U.S.C. § 1833(b) — Defend Trade Secrets Act whistleblower immunity / notice requirement
Consensus unilateral-NDA drafting practice (Common Paper, ACC, ABA practice notes)

name: Vendor Security Addendum
description: Linter for a Vendor Security Addendum / Information Security Exhibit. Selects the §34 addenda ruleset (security-only portion, ADDENDA-001..009): specific measures enumerated, security-review cadence, right-to-audit or SOC 2 substitution, incident-response notification window, vulnerability-disclosure handling, secure-development-lifecycle reference, data-classification mapping, named encryption standards (FIPS 140-3 / AES-256 / TLS 1.2+), penetration-test cadence.

sources.source: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 — Security and Privacy Controls
FIPS 140-3 — Security Requirements for Cryptographic Modules

name: Vendor Security Questionnaire (SIG / CAIQ)
description: Vendor security questionnaire (SIG / CAIQ-style) with NIST CSF + ISO 27001 baseline. Selects the §6.I ruleset (PRV-027..PRV-033).

name: Voting Agreement (NVCA)
description: NVCA-style voting agreement binding stockholders to vote for designated directors and drag-along sales. Selects the §6.C equity ruleset (EQT-057..EQT-063).

name: Whistleblower Policy
description: Whistleblower policy under SOX § 806 + Dodd-Frank § 922 + SEC Rule 21F-17. Selects the §6.O ruleset (POL-023..POL-027).

name: Work-for-Hire Agreement
description: Work-made-for-hire agreement under 17 U.S.C. § 101 with backup assignment + DTSA notice. Selects the §6.H ruleset (IPL-036..IPL-040).

name: Written Consent in Lieu of Meeting
description: Board or stockholder action by written consent. Selects the §6.B governance ruleset (GOV-043..GOV-050) under DGCL §§ 141(f) and 228.
